---
title: "Pypomp vs R LogLik Comparison"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    embed-resources: true
    code-fold: true
    code-summary: "View Code"
engine: python3  
---

```{python}
#| label: setup
#| echo: false
import logging
import os
import pickle
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
import pyreadr
from scipy.special import logsumexp
from plotnine import *

# Hide the noisy JAX CUDA initialization error on machines without a GPU
logging.getLogger("jax._src.xla_bridge").setLevel(logging.CRITICAL)
```


```{python}
#| label: logLik-comparison-data
#| echo: false


def load_pkl(filename):
    paths = [f"results/{filename}", f"{filename}"]
    for p in paths:
        if os.path.exists(p):
            with open(p, "rb") as f:
                return pickle.load(f)
    raise FileNotFoundError(
        f"Could not find {filename} in any of the expected locations: {paths}"
    )


def load_rds(filename):
    paths = [f"results/{filename}"]
    for p in paths:
        if os.path.exists(p):
            r_data = pyreadr.read_r(p)
            return r_data[None]
    raise FileNotFoundError(
        f"Could not find {filename} in any of the expected locations: {paths}"
    )


# Load pfilter logLik results (pf_ prefix to avoid collision with parameter comparison)
pf_py_results = load_pkl("pfilter_logliks_f32.pkl")
pf_py_results["source"] = "pypomp (32-bit)"

pf_py_exact_results = load_pkl("pfilter_logliks_f64.pkl")
pf_py_exact_results["source"] = "pypomp (64-bit)"

pf_r_results = load_rds("pfilter_logliks_f64.rds")
pf_r_results["source"] = "R"
```

# Particle filter comparison

## Summary statistics
```{python}
#| label: pfilter-summary-stats
cols = ["unit", "replicate", "logLik", "source"]

pf_combined = pd.concat(
    [pf_py_results[cols], pf_py_exact_results[cols], pf_r_results[cols]], ignore_index=True
)

pf_python_combined = pd.concat(
    [pf_py_exact_results[cols], pf_py_results[cols]], ignore_index=True
)


# Stable logmeanexp definition matching pomp's behavior
def logmeanexp(x):
    return logsumexp(x) - np.log(len(x))


summary_stats = (
    pf_combined.groupby(["unit", "source"])["logLik"]
    .agg(
        mean_logLik="mean",
        sd_logLik="std",
        min_logLik="min",
        max_logLik="max",
        logmeanexp_logLik=logmeanexp,
    )
    .reset_index()
)

pd.set_option("display.precision", 7)
print(summary_stats.to_string(index=False))
```

## Density plot
```{python}
#| label: comparison-plot
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 6
#| warning: false

# Toggle to filter outliers (London with very small logLik values)
filter_outliers = False
outlier_threshold = -3850

plot_data = pf_combined.copy()
if filter_outliers:
    plot_data = plot_data[
        ~((plot_data["unit"] == "London") & (plot_data["logLik"] < outlier_threshold))
    ]

p1 = (
    ggplot(plot_data, aes(x="logLik", fill="source"))
    + geom_density(alpha=0.6)
    + facet_wrap("~unit", scales="free")
    + labs(title="LogLik Comparison: Pypomp vs R", x="Log-Likelihood", fill="Source")
    + theme_minimal()
)
p1.show()
```
